summary: End-to-end testing of Lumière By Sambita Bose luxury interior site. Backend leads API (8 pytest cases) all pass. Frontend landing page, navigation, portfolio filter+lightbox, contact form submission+validation+toast+clear, admin leads table, mobile menu, and WhatsApp CTA all verified working against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: Framer-motion console warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' - originates from useScroll target ref in Hero.jsx. Harmless but should be silenced by adding position: relative (currently the <section> has `relative` class so this warning likely comes from the motion.div or elsewhere — worth a quick audit).

action_items: (Optional) Investigate framer-motion scroll-offset console warning in Hero.jsx — non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py create_lead uses broad try/except that turns Pydantic/DB errors into 500 — acceptable for MVP but consider letting FastAPI 422 flow naturally instead of wrapping in HTTPException 500.
GET /api/leads returns response_model=List[Lead] and leads already exclude _id via find projection — good.

ContactCTA uses form-level trim validation before POST — good. However there is no client-side email regex; relies on server Pydantic EmailStr. Works but error toast shows 'Submission failed.' for FastAPI 422 because detail is a list not a string. Consider formatting validation errors for user-facing message.
AdminLeads has no authentication — acceptable for MVP but should be noted; the admin endpoint is publicly accessible at /admin/leads.
Hero.jsx uses svh unit which is fine for modern browsers; fallback not provided.
No rate limiting on POST /api/leads — risk of spam.
All key interactive elements have data-testid — good.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 TEST_-prefixed lead records in MongoDB via API during tests (safe to leave, admin view shows 6 entries total).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py covers health, create (valid/invalid email/missing fields/empty name/optional message) and list (shape + desc sort + no _id). Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py -v. Frontend public URL is https://lumiere-interior.preview.emergentagent.com. Preloader ~1.8s so wait 3s+ before interacting with hero. All data-testids listed in review_request are present and working.
verified_flows: POST /api/leads accepts valid payload, returns {success, id, message}
POST /api/leads rejects invalid email and missing required fields (422)
GET /api/leads returns list sorted desc by created_at, no _id
Landing page loads, preloader shown then hero appears with headline 'Elevate your Home, Celebrity Style.' and overline 'Lumière By Sambita Bose · Est. 2012'
Portfolio item opens lightbox; close button works
Testimonials prev/next buttons clickable and cycle
Contact form: empty submit → error toast; valid submit → success toast 'Thank you. Our concierge will reach out within 24 hours.'; form cleared after success
/admin/leads renders leads-table with freshly-submitted TEST_UIClient lead visible
Mobile viewport (390x844): menu toggle opens & close works
WhatsApp CTA href points to wa.me/919810000000 with prefilled text
Dark luxury theme (black bg, gold/ivory accents) consistent across all sections
